name: tightrope
description: Tightrope Tracker — a live, transparent accountability dashboard mapping the real constraints on the UK government's growth agenda.

scripts.db:migrate:local: cd apps/api && wrangler d1 migrations apply tightrope_db --local --persist-to=../../.wrangler/state
scripts.db:migrate:remote: cd apps/api && wrangler d1 migrations apply tightrope_db --remote
scripts.db:seed:local: cd apps/api && wrangler d1 execute tightrope_db --local --file=../../db/seed/seed.sql --persist-to=../../.wrangler/state
scripts.db:seed:remote: cd apps/api && wrangler d1 execute tightrope_db --remote --file=../../db/seed/seed.sql
scripts.db:query:local: cd apps/api && wrangler d1 execute tightrope_db --local --persist-to=../../.wrangler/state --command
